prompt:
[Subject] Refer to Image 1 and Image 2

[Pose and Expression]
Standing with the Leaning Tower of Pisa in the background, smiling contentedly with the head tilted slightly toward the upper left. Holding an ice cream waffle cone in the left hand, positioned using perspective so the tower looks like soft-serve ice cream on top of the cone. Specify the perspective so the tower sits exactly like ice cream on the waffle cone.

[Outfit]
Wearing a simple black one-shoulder sleeveless top.

[Hair and Makeup]
Neat long natural hair parted in the center, draped calmly over the shoulders. Wearing black round cat-eye sunglasses and silver/pearl drop earrings. Long almond-shaped nails with pastel pink and yellow gradient.

[Lighting]
Intense direct midday sunlight from the upper right front on a clear day. Bright highlights on the face and shoulders, with sharp, high-contrast shadows on the chest and clothes caused by the hand and cone.

[Texture and Mood]
Vibrant contrast between the clear blue sky, green grass, and beige historic buildings. Vivid textures of the waffle cone and glossy sunglasses for a lively summer vacation mood.

[Camera Settings]
Medium close-up snapshot at eye level, aperture f/1.8, focal length 5.4mm, ISO 100, shutter speed 1/2000s. Reflects smartphone wide-angle characteristics with sharp focus on the person and cone, while the distant buildings are softly out of focus. Person is on the left of the frame, tower on the right.

[Background]
Duomo Square in Pisa, Italy. The leaning white marble tower is on the right, and the domed Pisa Cathedral is on the left. Manicured green grass between them under a cloudless blue sky.

[Signature] A small Threads logo at the bottom right with the name "CHAse" written in white cursive above it. 4.5 ratio
